FeatureClassToFeatureClass GG_Fields "C:\Users\Agri_Stew_Tech\Desktop\Working From Home\Windshield Surveys\Field Shapefiles for ONFARM Land MGMT Survey\Final shapefiles without data" ONFARM_GG_Fields_MVCA.shp # attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
